question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/publish/PublishProperties.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: validate()] Can an unprivileged external user configure a scenario with `type=TOKEN_GRANT_KYC` and `maxTransactionFee` set to an extreme value, exploiting the absence of a maximum fee constraint in `TokenGrantKycTransactionSupplier`, causing the operator to authorize KYC grant transactions with fees far outside design parameters?
